variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16445 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16445 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16445 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P611856 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16445
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson RadialSeal™ Filters? Reliable, leak- resistant Radial Seal™ keeps filters in place – even under heavy vibration. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 24 904/3 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16445
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF27682 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16445
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF27682 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
